question: How many customers do we have?
Show top 5 customers by revenue
sql: SELECT c.name, SUM(o.total_amount) FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY SUM(o.total_amount) DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the average order value?
How many orders have been placed?
Count orders by status
sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY status;

question: Top 10 most expensive products
sql: SELECT name, list_price FROM products ORDER BY list_price DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Count products by category
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM products GROUP BY category;

question: Count customers by segment
sql: SELECT segment, COUNT(*) FROM customers GROUP BY segment;

question: Show support tickets with High priority
Count support tickets by priority
sql: SELECT priority, COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets GROUP BY priority;

question: Show the latest 10 orders
sql: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY order_date DESC LIMIT 10;
